narrative:
Precinct Center North (precinct in Williams County) has 1,183 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
